g.title: C3G_QSP
g.text: C3 Glomerulopathy (C3G: DDD & C3GN) QSP Mechanistic Map
Alternative-Pathway Dysregulation (CFH/CFI/CFB/C3/C3NeF) · Glomerular C3 Deposition · Podocyte/Mesangial Injury · CKD Progression · Iptacopan/Pegcetacoplan/Eculizumab/Ravulizumab/Danicopan PK/PD

g.text: 8. 세뇨관간질 손상 및 섬유화 진행 (Tubulointerstitial Injury & Fibrosis)

g.text: 14. 다니코판 PK/PD (Oral Factor D Inhibitor, Add-on)
